strengths: 10+ years of full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Current AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators
Strong testing/TDD background with workshops, talks, and open-source test tooling
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure is dated (robotic arms, 2016-2018)
Cloud/containerization experience present but light on Kubernetes depth and GCP/Azure
response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ year bar with deep TypeScript/Node/React delivery, hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work directly relevant to the role, and a strong testing culture. Gaps around Nest.js and current Kotlin/Java are real but bridgeable given the demonstrated polyglot history (D, Java, C++, Python-adjacent tooling) and architectural breadth.
